steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The audience is already familiar with Bharati Mukherjee, so the introduction must focus on what makes this specific novel distinctive. Any information merely repeating facts about the author is already known and doesn't introduce the novel.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: C describes the novel's distinctive content: two central women characters living in vastly different centuries and locations. The other choices either lack clarity about the novel itself (A) or redundantly emphasize information about the author's other works (B and D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
